dict.string: We need access to your camera so you can take photos for editing (adding stickers, cropping, etc.) and save them to your journal and tea tracker. Photos you take are stored only on your device and are not uploaded to any servers.
The app itself does not require microphone access, but some system libraries may request this permission. We do not record or store any audio data.
We need this permission to save your edited photos (such as photos with stickers or cropped photos) to your photo library. This allows you to view and share these photos outside of the app.

We need access to your photo library so you can select photos for editing (adding stickers, cropping, etc.) and use them in journal and tea tracker features. This permission is also used to save edited photos back to your photo library. All photo operations are performed only on your device.
